wordplay_note: A knight from a small village — petty and combative
card_description: Chuck Rittersdorf (meaning "Rittersdorf = knight's village") is a character in Philip K. Dick's *Clans of the Alphane Moon*. CIA agent and husband in a bitter divorce who becomes entangled with a moon of mental patients. Name note: A knight from a small village — petty and combative. Bureaucratic malice — the spy whose real war is domestic. First appears in *Clans of the Alphane Moon*.

reference.brief: CIA agent and husband in a bitter divorce who becomes entangled with a moon of mental patients
reference.significance: Bureaucratic malice — the spy whose real war is domestic
